body:
Hey Amara — following up on our conversation from last week about the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) portfolio review. I wanted to share a few thoughts on the [Solstice Grid](companies/solstice-grid) deal before you head into the partner meeting on Thursday. Their unit economics at the seed stage look genuinely strong, and I think the grid-edge AI angle is differentiated enough to hold up against the crowded energy management space. That said, I'd want to pressure-test their go-to-market assumptions a bit more — the enterprise sales cycle they're projecting feels optimistic for a two-person founding team. Happy to jump on a quick call Wednesday if that would be useful before you finalize your position.

Nadia
